basic_details.job_title: DRDO DEAL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 45 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DRDO DEAL) has officially announced the DRDO Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 with 45 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. DEAL/HRD/Paid Internship-2026 on the official website. Candidates holding B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc. (Electronics) qualifications with a minimum CGPA of 7.0 and no backlogs in the first 5 semesters can now submit their offline applications up to 30 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) final year students with CGPA >= 7.0 and no backlogs in the first 5 semesters.
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. (Engineering) students who have completed 3rd year / 6th semester or going to complete by July 2026. M.Tech./M.Sc.(Electronics) students who have completed 1st year / 2nd semester or going to complete by July 2026. Students with CGPA ≥ 7.0 on a scale of 10 (from AICTE approved College/Universities). No backlogs (failed) in any of the exams in the first 05 semesters of degree.

salary_details.details: Stipend of total Rs. 30,000/- in two installments will be paid (Rs. 15,000/- after completion of 3 months and Rs. 15000/- after completion of 6 months) subject to attendance of minimum 15 days in a month.

selection_process: Selection will be based entirely on merit basis.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO DEAL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.drdo.gov.in/drdo/careers.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
